payload.answer: SQL debug/admin execution is disabled because BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false. No query was run and no memory cards were read or modified.

entity_resolution.reason: SQL admin access requested while BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false; no user memory entity resolution needed.

details: Rejected /brain admin sql request because debug SQL is disabled.
No existing memories were presented as current.

repair_options: Enable BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED in the appropriate debug environment before using /brain admin sql.
Use a non-SQL supported Brain admin/debug command if available.
